mapper.select: SELECT id, name, short_name, description, logo_url, official_website, is_985, is_211, is_double_first_class, school_type, education_level, tags, province, city FROM university WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id = #{universityId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(dormitory_score), 2) AS dormitory_score, ROUND(AVG(canteen_score), 2) AS canteen_score, ROUND(AVG(location_score), 2) AS location_score, ROUND(AVG(study_score), 2) AS study_score, ROUND(AVG(culture_score), 2) AS culture_score, ROUND(AVG(club_score), 2) AS club_score, ROUND(AVG(employment_score), 2) AS employment_score, ROUND(AVG(campus_score), 2) AS campus_score, ROUND(AVG(overall_score), 2) AS overall_score, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM university_review WHERE university_id = #{universityId} AND is_deleted = 0
